acid_blob.description: A roiling mass of acidic slime
acid_blob.name: Blob d'acide

alpaca.description: Alpacas are social animals, always sticking close to their herd
alpaca.name: Alpaga

angle.description: Their razor-thin bodies cutting through flesh and sanity alike
angle.name: Angle

armadillo.description: Living tanks that curl into impenetrable spheres
armadillo.name: Tatou

assimilator.description: A self-replicating machine that assimilates mass to build an army
assimilator.name: Assimilateur

bioblob.description: A blob of shifting biological matter with eyes that stare into your soul
bioblob.name: Bioblob

buffalo.description: Shaggy behemoth of the Great Plains
buffalo.name: Buffle

butterfly.description: Beautiful flying insect that likes flowers
butterfly.name: Papillon

capybara.description: This water-loving rodent is as relaxed as it is large
capybara.name: Capybara

chicken.description: Have you heard about this bird?
chicken.name: Poulet

civ_acid_gentleman.description: You'll be drawn in by their manners, only to be eaten away by their nature
civ_acid_gentleman.name: Gentleman acide

civ_alpaca.description: Soft, fluffy, and always ready to charm their way out of trouble
civ_alpaca.name: Charmaca

civ_armadillo.description: Born to rock, built to roll
civ_armadillo.name: Armaldar

civ_bear.description: Fierce on the battlefield, but soft enough to help their cubs bake cookies
civ_bear.name: Grranth

civ_beetle.description: Rolling to their future one ball at a time, always aiming for the top
civ_beetle.name: Dunglord

civ_buffalo.description: Horns may be for fighting, but those hooves? They're all about dancing the night away
civ_buffalo.name: Buffolon

civ_candy_man.description: Behind those sugary smiles lies a hunger for blood and flesh
civ_candy_man.name: Homme Bonbon

civ_cat.description: They may look adorable, but those claws say otherwise
civ_cat.name: Meowmorph

civ_cow.description: They're calm, until someone looks at them wrong - then it's time to mooooove
civ_cow.name: Mootaur

civ_crab.description: They might walk funny, but when it comes to battle, they're deadly serious
civ_crab.name: Crablin

civ_crocodile.description: They spend most of their time plotting domination, and the rest pretending they're not
civ_crocodile.name: Reptiloïde

civ_crystal_golem.description: They've got that cool, calm, ocean vibe - right until you upset them

civ_dog.description: Their loyalty is legendary, their bite is worse
civ_dog.name: Barkfolk

civ_fox.description: In the game of life, they never play fair - and that's why they always win
civ_fox.name: Slypaw

civ_frog.description: Quick as the wind, deadly as a lily pad to the face
civ_frog.name: Ribbit

civ_garlic_man.description: Smell that? That's the scent of victory
civ_garlic_man.name: Homme d'ail

civ_goat.description: Stubborn as a rock, but just as reliable
civ_goat.name: Herdor

civ_hyena.description: The bigger the chaos, the louder they laugh
civ_hyena.name: Lulclaw

civ_lemon_man.description: Tough on the outside, sour on the inside
civ_lemon_man.name: Homme Citron

civ_liliar.description: Rain isn't enough for these flowers - they prefer to drink the tears of their defeated foes
civ_liliar.name: Lulliar

civ_monkey.description: Silent as shadows, deadly as a well-placed banana peel
civ_monkey.name: Monke

civ_penguin.description: They dream in warm hues, where they paint with the blood of their fallen foes
civ_penguin.name: Coolbeak

civ_piranha.description: On land or sea, their hunger knows no bounds
civ_piranha.name: Gnapkin

civ_rabbit.description: When in doubt, hop it out
civ_rabbit.name: Hopper

civ_rat.description: They steal hearts... and a few other things
civ_rat.name: Nibling

civ_rhino.description: They do not always hit, but when they do, they hit hard
civ_rhino.name: Armoroc

civ_scorpion.description: The guardians of the desert's deepest secrets
civ_scorpion.name: Scorp

civ_seal.description: Most elite warriors of the sea, trained to fight in any conditions
civ_seal.name: Navy Seal

civ_sheep.description: Where others see grass, they see potential profit
civ_sheep.name: Baakin

civ_snake.description: Their sarcasm's so sharp, it's basically venom - and it stings more than their bite ever could
civ_snake.name: Snok

civ_turtle.description: They live long enough to see their enemies become dust
civ_turtle.name: Turtok

civ_unicorn.description: Even demons find them too loud
civ_unicorn.name: Punkcorn

civ_wolf.description: The howl isn't just a warning - it's a promise that blood will be spilled tonight
civ_wolf.name: Howleer

cow.description: It goes moo, doesn't say meow
cow.name: Vache

crab.description: A tiny animal that loves to rave
crab.name: Crabe

crabzilla.description: Become an enormous Crab, the destroyer of worlds
crabzilla.name: Crabzilla

crystal_sword.description: Sharp as the sea and twice as salty
crystal_sword.name: Épée en cristal

dragon.description: Scary flying lizard that brings destruction to your world. Fun!
dragon.name: Dragon

druid.description: She likes to watch the grass grow
druid.name: Druidesse

dwarf.description: Master craftsmen who never forget a grudge
dwarf.name: Nain

elf.description: Mystical beings with a superiority complex and great hair
elf.name: Elfe

fairy.description: Peaceful creature, that heals everyone around it
fairy.name: Fée

fire_elemental.description: A demonic being born from flames, turning everything to ash in its path
fire_elemental.name: Élémentaire de Feu

fire_skull.description: A demonic spirit, imprisoned within a fiery skull
fire_skull.name: Crâne enflammé

flower_bud.description: It may look pretty, but it has the personality of a cactus
flower_bud.name: Bourgeon de Fleur

garl.description: Has a bite as strong as its smell
garl.name: Garl

ghost.description: A whisper on the wind, a shadow in the corner of your eye
ghost.name: Fantôme

goat.description: Known for its playful headbutts and endless curiosity
goat.name: Chèvre

grasshopper.description: Tiny insect that likes to jump around happily
grasshopper.name: Sauterelle

human.description: Masters of adaptation and bad decisions
human.name: Humain

hyena.description: Known for laughing at their prey
hyena.name: Hyène

living_plants.description: Make plants and trees come to life

monkey.description: It can throw rocks. What next?
monkey.name: Singe

orc.description: Warriors with a heart of gold and a head of stone
orc.name: Orc

ostrich.description: Who needs flying when you can sprint like the wind?
ostrich.name: Autruche

penguin.description: A bird that was built for swimming
penguin.name: Manchot

plague_doctor.description: Trust her, she is a doctor in a cool mask
plague_doctor.name: Docteur de la peste

printer.description: Use this printer-ant that will create a brand new landscape for you with zero effort
printer.name: Imprimante

raccoon.description: A furry bandit, sneaking through the lands in search of treasures (or snacks)
raccoon.name: Raton laveur

scorpion.description: Silent and swift, the scorpion uses its venomous sting to defend and attack
scorpion.name: Scorpion

skeleton.description: Spooky scary skeleton that can fight
skeleton.name: Squelette

smore.description: A terrifying creature that spreads death and destruction purely for fun
smore.name: Smore

worm.description: Crawls underground and messes up the landscape
worm.name: Ver
